description_long: This is a low-polygon adult male figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring a short-sleeved, open-collared shirt layered over a t-shirt. The figure has straight, dark hair styled neatly and a well-defined jawline. He is wearing fitted pants and simple shoes, with no visible accessories or carried items. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral facial expression. The clothing and body are rendered in blocky, faceted shapes typical of stylized digital models.
description: A stylized adult male in casual attire with short hair, standing with arms outstretched and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open-collared shirt, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt over a t-shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
